scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/cli build && bun run --cwd packages/vite-plugin build && bun run --cwd packages/rspack-plugin build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/core typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/cli typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/vite-plugin typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/rspack-plugin typecheck
